Title: n8n has XSS in Chat Trigger Node through Custom CSS
Description: An authenticated user with permission to create or modify workflows could inject malicious JavaScript into the Custom CSS field of the Chat Trigger node. Due to a misconfiguration in the `sanitize-html` library, the sanitization could be bypassed, resulting in stored XSS on the public chat page. Any user visiting the chat URL would be affected.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 1.123.27, all versions starting from 2.0.0-rc.0 before 2.13.3, all versions starting from 2.14.0 before 2.14.1, version 2.14.0
